sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AMAZON COM INC : UBS maintains a Buy rating
feed.summary: UBS has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN), with analyst Stephen Ju slightly increasing the target price from $301 to $304. The article highlights Amazon's diversified business, including online retail, marketplace activities, and various product categories, noting that the company generates 58.7% of its net sales from services and 41.3% from products. Geographically, the U.S. accounts for the largest portion of its net sales at 68.3%.

feed.title: Director at Warrior Met Coal (NYSE: HCC) receives 1,423 RSUs as equity award
feed.summary: Alan H. Schumacher, a director at Warrior Met Coal, Inc. (NYSE: HCC), has been granted 1,423 restricted stock units (RSUs) under the company's 2026 Equity Incentive Plan. These RSUs, with an exercise price of $0.00, will vest on April 20, 2027, and be settled in common stock upon the termination of his directorship, as per his deferral election. This award adds to a previous grant of 2,534 RSUs from the 2017 plan, which vest in April 2026 and are similarly deferred.

feed.title: Earth Day 2026: Ecolab’s Water Navigator IQ Platform
feed.summary: Ecolab has launched Water Navigator IQ on Earth Day 2026, an AI-enabled platform designed to help global organizations manage their water usage more efficiently. This platform provides site-level insights and predictive analytics to help companies understand, benchmark, and improve their water performance, thereby reducing risk and driving business growth in an increasingly water-stressed world, especially with the rising demand for water due to AI. The initiative highlights water management as critical for economic stability and resilience, as approximately 60% of global GDP relies on reliable water access.
